subject: name alignment
commit_message:
name alignment

as part of the name alignment i want to change all occurrences of asdc to sdc.

Change-Id: I2eb9ff087d3cfd61c0c1347d085dd02da64c2d89
Issue-Id: INT-100
Signed-off-by: Michael Lando <ml636r@att.com>
Signed-off-by: Victor Morales <victor.morales@intel.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/demo-master-verify-java/263/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/demo-master-verify-java/263

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Michael, 

It seems like more places will need to be changed.

grep -R "asdc" .                                                                                                              12:54:53
./boot/mso_vm_init.sh:    "asdc-connections":
./boot/mso_vm_init.sh:      "asdc-controller1":
./boot/sdc_install.sh:curl -k $NEXUS_REPO/org.onap.demo/boot/$ARTIFACTS_VERSION/asdc_vm_init.sh -o /opt/asdc_vm_init.sh
./boot/sdc_install.sh:curl -k $NEXUS_REPO/org.onap.demo/boot/$ARTIFACTS_VERSION/asdc_serv.sh -o /opt/asdc_serv.sh
./boot/sdc_install.sh:chmod +x /opt/asdc_vm_init.sh
./boot/sdc_install.sh:chmod +x /opt/asdc_serv.sh
./boot/sdc_install.sh:mv /opt/asdc_serv.sh /etc/init.d
./boot/sdc_install.sh:update-rc.d asdc_serv.sh defaults
./boot/sdc_install.sh:curl -k $NEXUS_REPO/org.onap.demo/boot/$ARTIFACTS_VERSION/asdc_ext_volume_partitions.txt -o /opt/asdc_ext_volume_partitions.txt
./boot/sdc_install.sh:  sed -i "s/xvdb/$DISK/g" /opt/asdc_ext_volume_partitions.txt
./boot/sdc_install.sh:sfdisk /dev/$DISK < /opt/asdc_ext_volume_partitions.txt
./boot/sdc_install.sh:./asdc_vm_init.sh
./boot/sdc_serv.sh:cmd="./asdc_vm_init.sh"
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack.yaml:            curl -k __nexus_repo__/org.onap.demo/boot/__artifacts_version__/asdc_install.sh -o /opt/asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack.yaml:            chmod +x asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack.yaml:            ./asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack_float.yaml:            curl -k __nexus_repo__/org.onap.demo/boot/__artifacts_version__/asdc_install.sh -o /opt/asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack_float.yaml:            chmod +x asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack_float.yaml:            ./asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack_nofloat.yaml:            curl -k __nexus_repo__/org.onap.demo/boot/__artifacts_version__/asdc_install.sh -o /opt/asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack_nofloat.yaml:            chmod +x asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_openstack_nofloat.yaml:            ./asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_rackspace.yaml:            curl -k __nexus_repo__/org.onap.demo/boot/__artifacts_version__/asdc_install.sh -o /opt/asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_rackspace.yaml:            chmod +x asdc_install.sh
./heat/ONAP/onap_rackspace.yaml:            ./asdc_install.sh
